label: Auroral Suture Chamber
description: Auroral Suture Chamber is a narrow sleeping room aligned to Suturesill House’s axial reflections, its laminar mirror-slag walls set in seam-grooved bands that register the copper-white twilight as precise, repeating gradients. A low bed-platform is built into the escarpment-facing side, with basalt-glass shelving recessed into the panel seams to preserve the room’s calibrated sightlines. Electrostatic vent baffles maintain a stable filigree of charged glass dust along the lintels, turning accumulation into deliberate, pale tracery. A slit aperture above the headwall frames the auroral girdle’s fixed arc, functioning as a domestic index of the hushlit lattice’s geometry.
